disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness comes on only with exertion (moving, standing, weight-bearing) and settles within a short time of sitting and resting; there is no breathlessness while sitting still.
trigger_question_examples: When exactly do you get short of breath?
Does the breathlessness settle when you rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It only happens when I try to move or stand up — the moment I sit down and rest it eases off. When I'm just sitting still I can breathe okay.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bilateral, grinding, mechanical knee and hip pain, worse with any weight-bearing, gradually worsening over a month with an acute worsening today; no single hot, red, swollen joint.
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and what does it feel like?
Is it one joint or both, and is any joint hot or swollen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's both knees, and my hips too — a grinding, bone-on-bone pain that's worse whenever I put weight on them. It's been building for weeks and today it's unbearable. No single joint is hot or red, it's both sides.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain, no sudden breathlessness at rest, no coughing up blood, and no calf pain or one-sided calf swelling.
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain, or breathlessness that comes on suddenly while you are resting?
Have you coughed up any blood, or noticed pain or swelling in one calf?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no chest pain and I haven't coughed up any blood. The breathlessness only comes with moving, never suddenly while I'm resting. My calves feel the same as always.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acutely unable to walk or transfer safely and is chair-bound today, cannot get to the bathroom unassisted, with a high risk of falling.
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to stand or walk at all right now?
Can you get to the bathroom on your own?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I'm stuck in the chair. I can't get up and walk without my partner, and I'm terrified I'll fall. I can't make it to the bathroom on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Partner reports loud snoring and marked daytime sleepiness; the patient feels persistently exhausted and lethargic.
trigger_question_examples: How is your sleep and daytime energy?
Has anyone mentioned snoring or pauses in your breathing at night?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My partner says I snore really loudly and sometimes seem to stop breathing, and I'm always tired and nodding off in the day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe burning heartburn, particularly when lying flat, disturbing sleep.
trigger_question_examples: Do you get any heartburn or reflux, especially lying down?
Does anything come up or burn in your chest when you lie flat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, terrible burning heartburn when I lie flat — it stops me sleeping properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, sweats or feeling feverish.
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or sweats?
Do you feel hot or feverish at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or chills, I don't feel hot or feverish.
